calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
William J. Kelly, Esq. for Plaintiff: Roofing Supply of Northern California, LLC et al.
Plaintiff's witness: Clifford Archulate, was sworn and examined.
Exhibit 1---Credit application and agreement-------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Invoice--------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Invoice--------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Declaration of Ann Damian--------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Bargain Roofing, a Californai Corp. as follows:
Damages $10,699.40
Attorney's Fees $1,300.00
Costs $300.00 for a total of $12,299.40
Counsel to prepare AMENDED JUDGMENT.

April 29, 2005
Amended Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned for details.
